chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1709 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.875/2024 2. For orders on statement dated 31.01.2024 28-02-2024 Petitioner Sikander Ali Janwri, Assistant Registrar, Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur, in person.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- It is date by court matter fixed on 19.03.2024. However, petitioner is present and has filed a statement/application for withdrawal of this petition along with urgent application. Urgent application is granted and the case is antedated and taken up today. The statement/application is allowed and the petition is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
